title: Shinjis harem of Fangirls
wikitext:
[]: Shinji's harem of Fangirls Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sat Sep 12, 2009 11:11 am Please forgive me if this has been brought up in athread already, I seriously dont wanna be banned again but I think Mr.Tines has discussed this somewhere before however I wanna hear other peoples thoughts about the matter - I was wondering if anyone else thought it would be interesting or what if anything at all it might change if instead of becoming interested in Rei or Asuka Shinji instead went after one of his many fangirls from episode 2 or 3 I think, when he admitted to being the pilot of Unit 01? Again, if this has been brought up while I dont wanna be a pain to the admins, please just move, lock or delete it; whichever one is most apporopiate and please not ban me.

[]: Post by Sachi » Sat Sep 12, 2009 11:30 am Well, if he did manage to land a girl, and they admired his feminine characteristics, and were able to put up with his bleak outlook on life, etc, then perhaps Shinji's self-confidence might have gone up and the entire plot could be changed. Or it could spiral downward completely when that girl breaks up with him.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Sep 12, 2009 11:45 am Shinji doesn't have a harem of fangirls. But if you pay attention, you'll notice that there are only a few boys in that classroom scene, and they do flock to Shinji as well, but they are on the outside of the huddle.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sat Sep 12, 2009 12:08 pm But what's the use of a harem of fangirls when none of them hit you and call you an idiot? :(

[]: Re: Shinji's harem of Fangirls Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Sep 12, 2009 12:12 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: Mr.Tines has discussed this somewhere before

[]: Post by toe mash » Sat Sep 12, 2009 12:28 pm Mr. Tines wrote: There has to be one of them who isn't a highly-strung neurotic and isn't a near autist either.

[]: Post by Defectron » Sat Sep 12, 2009 12:56 pm Well they all supposedly don't have a mother, so I bet each one of them has some kind of emotional defect in their own special way!

[]: Post by Synapsid » Sat Sep 12, 2009 2:19 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Shinji doesn't have a harem of fangirls. But if you pay attention, you'll notice that there are only a few boys in that classroom scene, and they do flock to Shinji as well, but they are on the outside of the huddle.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Sep 12, 2009 3:26 pm Synapsid wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Shinji doesn't have a harem of fangirls. But if you pay attention, you'll notice that there are only a few boys in that classroom scene, and they do flock to Shinji as well, but they are on the outside of the huddle.

[]: Post by Synapsid » Sat Sep 12, 2009 3:39 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: The show takes more time, however, to establish everyone's interest in Asuka. Shinji does not have a harem. If he did, they would have touched upon it for more than 30 seconds, to be quickly forgotten.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Sep 12, 2009 4:06 pm Synapsid wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: The show takes more time, however, to establish everyone's interest in Asuka. Shinji does not have a harem. If he did, they would have touched upon it for more than 30 seconds, to be quickly forgotten.
